subcodes.first_line: O you who are firm in the Covenant! Your document has arrived, and the happenings indicating the splendid manifestation of God’s Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان لائحه شما وصول یافت و از وقایع جلوه ملکوت الله مسامع یاران
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause
